items.raw_desc: LTE antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G:        Directional antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G with cross-polarization is the optimal solution for 4G/5G reception and backward compatible with LTE/2G/3G in areas with weak signal. Two integrated 2 MIMO antennas with opposite polarization support diversity of reception and thus ensure a quality signal. Compared to the previous generation, this antenna has a redesigned inner part for even higher efficiency. In addition to the new bands, the gain at 1700 MHz and 2.7 GHz is approximately 3 dB higher than the previous generation. Antenna Poynting XPOL-2-5G  is supplied with double low-loss cable HDF-195 of 5 m length terminated with 2× SMA-m connector. The SMA connector used is commonly used in a wide range of routers. To maximize signal quality and minimize potential transients, the antenna does not use connectors and the cable is connected directly. items.raw_desc: Távcső Levenhuk New Vegas ED 8x42:Levenhuk New Vegas ED 8×42 binoculars are suitable for nature observation, hunters, travelers and tourists. You can use it even in inclement weather, near water or in environments with high humidity. It stands out with its high-quality optics that provide a clear, faithful and sharp image. It offers 8x magnification and a true field of view of 7°. It has roof prisms and a special eyepiece construction consisting of 5 optical elements in 3 groups. The lenses and prisms are complemented by multiple anti-reflective coatings to increase brightness and facilitate low-light viewing. The lens is made of low dispersion glass without chromatic aberration, the prisms are made of BaK-4 optical glass with high light transmission. The binoculars allow for dioptric correction adjustment within the range of ±4D and interpupillary distance from 63 to 78 mm.
